blocks.text: This document showcases CLI-driven page templates. The header is set via --header-* flags and the footer via --footer-* flags. Placeholders {page}, {pages}, {date}, and {title} are interpolated at render time.
Quarterly throughput exceeded plan by 14%. Operations met SLAs across every tracked region. The page footer renders the global page counter — see the bottom of every printed page.
Top 3 risk items are tracked in the risk register and reviewed monthly. The header tracks the document title across pages.
Bookings pipeline supports a 12% expansion in Q+1. Detailed forecast attached.

metadata.subject: Headers & footers via CLI page templates
